journey-onboard.evidence: Landing page shows a clearly visible '🎨 Start Creating' link without scrolling, linking to /create.

journey-builder.evidence: Three.js canvas renders at 1536x1252 and sidebar shows object pickers (Shapes, Nature, Build, Animals, People, Props) with individual items like Box, Ball, Tube, Cone.

journey-ai.evidence: AI Creative Buddy panel is visible with text input; typing 'help me' returned a non-empty response: 'That's okay! There's no wrong way to build. Try placing any object and see how it feels.'

journey-save.evidence: Save button exists and persists data to localStorage, but after reloading /create the builder shows 0 objects instead of restoring the saved Box object.

journey-gallery.evidence: Gallery at /gallery renders a 'My Gallery' heading with a card showing the saved 'My World' with 1 object, author, and date.

spec-starter-code.evidence: final-reply and src/ directory with 20 source files

spec-priority-screens.evidence: final-reply truncated before section 13; no dedicated section found in project files

visual-anti-patterns.evidence: Purple-to-blue gradient hero on landing page; body/metadata text appears sub-16px in several places (gallery byline, category tabs, environment labels); gallery shows card-inside-card nesting (thumbnail container within outer card); builder shows 7 distinct UI groups at once (nav, object categories, object grid, 3D canvas, environment bar, AI panel, chat input)

visual-child-friendly.evidence: Playful tone throughout with emoji, friendly AI buddy with suggestion chips, big CTA buttons on landing, whimsical environment names; slightly dense builder UI with small category tabs prevents a 5

visual-consistency.evidence: DreamWorld branding and rounded card shapes are consistent, but button styles drift across pages (orange/teal on landing, purple on gallery, mixed in builder) and the landing gradient aesthetic clashes with the builder's clean white style

visual-accessibility.evidence: Most text areas show adequate contrast and inputs have visible focus borders; text labels accompany most interactive elements, but some top-bar icons lack labels and no evidence of responsive layout adaptation

eng-env-safety.evidence: no hardcoded keys, no env refs either
